title: Moves Like a Cat
summary: Lithe, flexible, and graceful, you move quickly and smoothly, and never seem to be where danger is.
tiers: Tier 3: Enhanced Speed Edge or Greater Enhanced Speed
Tier 6: Perfect Speed Burst or Greater Enhanced Speed
gm_intrusions: Even a cat can be clumsy. A jump isn’t quite as easy as it looks. An escape move is so overzealous that it sends the character right into harm’s way.
text: Lithe, flexible, and graceful, you move quickly and smoothly, and never seem to be where danger is.
details: Lithe, flexible, and graceful, you move quickly and smoothly, and never seem to be where danger is.
